emotional_tone: Grounded, warm, structured, trustworthy. Merges Portuguese heritage with modern efficient event management.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-light text-[#1A1A1A]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-[#1A1A1A]

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing: p-6, p-8, p-12. Internal padding for bordered containers must be p-6 or p-8.
layout_and_spacing.admin_dashboard_grid: Control Room Mode: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized. h-full on children.
layout_and_spacing.brand_portal_grid: Bento Grid Mode: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12, wide gaps (gap-8). Mix wide spans and tall spans for asymmetry.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, labels, tables. Center-align hero text or empty states.

surfaces_and_components.cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF), 1px solid border (#E5E5DF), no shadow. Hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border color darkens.
surfaces_and_components.headers: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAFAF7]/80, 1px bottom border (#E5E5DF).
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#8C3B20] text-white hover:bg-[#A14A2E]. Secondary buttons: border border-[#E5E5DF] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#F2F2ED]. No extreme border-radius, use rounded-md (6px).
surfaces_and_components.inputs: Shadcn standard inputs customized: border-[#E5E5DF], focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#8C3B20]/20 focus:border-[#8C3B20].
surfaces_and_components.tables: Shadcn tables with border-collapse, subtle bottom border on rows (#E5E5DF), hover row bg (#F2F2ED/50).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must change background and explicitly set text color on hover. E.g., hover:bg-[#A14A2E] hover:text-white.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties: transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out, transition-transform duration-200 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interactions.focus: Focus states must have high contrast rings.

media.icons: @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Regular weight for elegant, clear UI). Install via: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react

login_background.description: Abstract terracotta and stone textured background for Auth/Login pages.

dashboard_header_texture.description: Minimalist header background for premium brand portal feel.

brand_portal_hero.description: Sines Castle at sunset, representing the Mercado no Castelo event location.

sustainability_hero.description: Braganca Castle view for sustainability or logistics sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML tags and pure Tailwind CSS for structural layouts instead of restricting to Shadcn cards if advanced asymmetry is needed.
Use Shadcn UI for interactive components (Forms, Tables, Dialogs, Select, Tabs, Calendar) but customize border radiuses (rounded-md) and colors to match the earthy palette.
DO NOT use generic colors like blue-500 or slate-900. Stick strictly to the defined hex codes (Terracotta, Moss Green, Sand, Off-white).
Always apply 'data-testid' to interactive elements for testing.
Ensure high contrast and accessibility. Use the specific text_muted and text_primary hex codes.
For the Admin dashboard, use a dense 'Control Room' grid layout. For the Brand portal, use a looser, more editorial 'Bento' grid.
Avoid using a hamburger menu on desktop viewports. Ensure all navigation is explicitly visible on desktop.
Do not use HTML inputs like type='date' or <select>. Always use Shadcn's equivalent components.
